'''ây-p-l-s''' ('''kayaplesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokemate|yokemate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokemate|yokemate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-p-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kayaplesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaplesoko|thiyaplesoko]] || [[word:jiyaplesoko|jiyaplesoko]] || [[word:shiyaplesoko|shiyaplesoko]] || [[word:kiyaplesoko|kiyaplesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
